hero.headline: We Build Websites, AI Agents & Automation Systems
hero.description: Use modern technology to grow your business. We build websites, AI chatbots, and automation systems.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: Services we provide to our clients
services.default1Desc: Modern, fast websites that work perfectly on mobile and attract customers.
services.default2Desc: AI chatbots that talk to your customers 24/7 and automatically generate leads.
services.default3Desc: Automate repetitive tasks — emails, invoices, follow-ups all automatic.
